caption: A man with blond hair, wearing round glasses, white over-ear headphones, and a dark blue t-shirt, is speaking while sitting in front of a light-colored wooden wall. To his left, a decorated Christmas tree with multicolored lights is partially visible. Behind him is a framed screen displaying a blue interface with the number "20" visible. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. As he speaks, his facial expressions shift from a wide smile and open mouth to a more focused look with a slight frown. He gestures with his right hand, initially raising his index finger in a pointing motion before lowering his hand. Throughout the sequence, the setting and his clothing remain constant while his mouth movements and hand gestures change as he expresses himself.
